sessions.session_theme: Automated Feeding and Hidden Health Risks
sessions.conversation_seed: Lin Xiao checks the automatic feeder, recalls Mochi's history of intestinal obstruction, and verifies the safety of Orijen cat food.
Xiao Li brings out the electric fishing rod toy; Lin Xiao takes the opportunity to replace the corrugated cardboard scratcher, discussing the vacuuming needs of British Shorthairs.

sessions.session_theme: The Ritual of Coming Home to a Rental
sessions.conversation_seed: Returning to the rental, Mochi waits by the cat bed to greet Lin Xiao, who feels a warm sense of companionship while working in front of the monitor.
It's time for the bi-weekly bath with imported shampoo; Lin Xiao carefully inspects the skin, reviewing the history of ringworm and the importance of an enclosed balcony.
The quarterly trip to the pet store turns into a check-up at An'an Pet Hospital, where Dr. Zhang's professionalism makes Lin Xiao feel reassured.
At a pet-friendly park in Hangzhou, they run into Chen Chen and a Golden Retriever; while sharing videos, they discuss nail trimming and past accidents.
During a late-night overtime shift, Mochi's purring beside the keyboard becomes Lin Xiao's best emotional support, easing the anxiety caused by design drafts.
Lin's mother brings homemade chicken jerky; during a video call, they discuss how a past ingestion crisis transformed their sense of responsibility.

sessions.session_theme: Silent Paternal Love and Warmth Care
sessions.conversation_seed: Though Lin's father speaks little, he bought a new cat bed and a heater for the cat; photos shared in the group reveal his silent affection.
On the annual anniversary downstairs from the office, Lin Xiao rushes home to answer Mochi's dinner call with a can of Xiao Li Zi, relieving the pressure of being a designer.
Before leaving, Lin Xiao repeatedly checks the balcony locks and small items, transforming health anxiety about intestinal obstruction into strict preventive behavior.
During a joyful feeding moment, Lin Xiao locks the Partner freeze-dried treats in a high cabinet, recalling the emergency room visit triggered by plastic packaging.

sessions.session_theme: Professional Humor and Gratitude for Adoption
sessions.conversation_seed: Joking about Mochi's supervisory behavior while looking at UI design drafts, Lin Xiao reflects on how the adoption decision made during an overtime night in 2021 has brought happiness today.
Chen Chen visits, and everyone flips through sleep videos of Mochi on their phones, expressing gratitude for the companionship that began in the winter of 2021.
Facing pressure from a new project, Lin Xiao finds a sense of security on the enclosed balcony, reviewing the reinforced locks installed after the 2023 ingestion incident.
Vacuuming up cat fur brings a sense of satisfaction; Lin Xiao notes details in a notebook regarding discussions with Dr. Zhang about degreasing and ringworm treatment.

sessions.session_theme: Professional Stress Relief Through Daily Care
sessions.conversation_seed: On the bi-weekly bath day, Lin Xiao bathes Mochi while venting about design drafts; the routine of being greeted upon returning home heals their workplace humor.

sessions.session_theme: A Night of Gratitude by the Cat Bed
sessions.conversation_seed: Beside the cat bed in the rental, Lin Xiao reflects on the choice made in 2021, noting how the automatic feeder ensures safety throughout the night.
On the anniversary downstairs from the office, Lin Xiao carries the warmth of homemade chicken jerky home to perform a detailed skin check on Mochi.
Lin's mother brings chicken jerky again; Lin Xiao transforms this family warmth into confidence while socializing with Chen Chen, sharing videos of Mochi's growth.
